Turn 58 вҖ” final theorem-proof note with appendix boundary made explicit I used only the three files attached to this turn. The conclusion remains:О“Sвү…GО“H.More strongly, the attached sweep supports the existence of a continuous automorphismОҰ:Fвҹ¶вҲјF over G such thatОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH.

Since rS and rSвҲ’1 generate the same closed normal subgroup of F, this descends to an isomorphism

F/вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©Fвү…G

F/вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F,i.e.О“Sвү…GО“H.The attached Turn 57 records exactly this final state: the only remaining issue is not mathematical, but external reproducibility of the verifier scripts or explicit matrices in a standalone appendix.

Theorem

There exists a continuous automorphism ОҰ:FвҶ’F over G such thatОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH.

Consequently,О“Sвү…GО“H.Proof

Fix the source orientationПҒS:=rSвҲ’1.This is the orientation used throughout the sweep. It is harmless becauseвҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©F=вҹЁвҹЁrSвҲ’1вҹ©вҹ©F.Thus it is enough to construct an over-G automorphism of F carrying ПҒS to rH.LetОӣ=Z2 [[G]].

On Pab, with right Оӣ-basis X0,X1, the linearized rows arewS=(Пғ+3E,вҲ’2),wH=(Eg0+3EвҲ’2,ПғвҲ’E),where E=eвҹЁП„вҹ©. The comparison splits by idempotents. On the (1вҲ’E)-piece, the rows (Пғ,вҲ’2) and (вҲ’2,Пғ) are exchanged by swapping the two generators. On the E-piece, writes=Пғ2,a=Пғ 1вҲ’ПҖ2,and split further by f=eвҹЁaвҹ©. On the dangerous Ef-piece the rows become (s+3,вҲ’2),(s2+1,sвҲ’1).

The row-action matrixU0=( sвҲ’1sвҲ’212)satisfies (s+3,вҲ’2)U0=(s2+1,sвҲ’1),and det(U0)=2(sвҲ’1)вҲ’(sвҲ’2)=s,which is a unit. The E(1вҲ’f)-piece is also handled by a unit-determinant matrix, so these pieces glue to a global

UвҲҲGL2(Оӣ)carrying wS to wH. This fixes the first Magnus layer of the desired filtered Nielsen transformation. The attached history records this H1 -matrix and its role as the initial Nielsen lift.

After this H1 -change, the non-Ef pieces are unit-controlled: every higher correction equation there has a unit coefficient, so the filtered IA corrections solve those pieces recursively. Thus the only delicate part is the local Ef-piece.On the residual Ef, mod-2, s=1 piece, the obstruction equation isS(Y0,Y1,q)=(Y1,Y1q)вҲ’1Y1вҲ’2Y03Y0q=X2 inside the completed mod-2 Magnus algebra with X=1+A, Y=1+B. If a first error appears in homogeneous degree n, it is primitive, hence lies in the degree n part Ln of the free restricted Lie algebra. The correction boundary isвҲӮnвҲ’1:LnвҲ’1вҠ•LnвҲ’1вҶ’Ln,(U,V)вҶҰ[A,U]+[B,V].

The residual induction established in the sweep provesCm=Lm (mвүҘ5),so every odd primitive layer is an ordinary boundary, and every even square quotient is hit by a root transgression

WвҶҰW[2].Hence the entire residual Ef, mod-2, s=1 obstruction tower vanishes.It remains to lift from the residue field to the full Ef-coefficient ring. Locally,

R=EfОӣвүғZ2 [[t]],t=sвҲ’1.

The raw local row is(s2+1,sвҲ’1)=(2+2t+t2,t).But(s2+1)вҲ’(s+1)(sвҲ’1)=2,so the elementary Nielsen shearN=(1вҲ’(s+1)01)carries the row exactly to(s2+1,sвҲ’1)N=(2,t).

Thus the apparent 2t+t2 term is a coordinate artifact. In normalized coordinates, the associated graded coefficient ring isgr(2,t)

RвүғF2 [Оұ,ОІ],Оұ=in(2),ОІ=in(t),and the row is the regular Koszul row (Оұ,ОІ). The first t-layer is contractible. The first 2-Bockstein secondary maps satisfyBdвҶ Hd(2)(dвүҘ4),and the higher (2,t)-adic layers are handled by the normalized KoszulвҖ“Witt cascade, ordered by Magnus root degree first. The attached ledger records this coefficient closure, including the final D.3 stack-rank certificate rankD5,6,7=60,rank(D5,6,7Ој4B4)=61.

That rank jump is the executable certificate that the A2=R/(4,t), d=4, Ој4 -scalar obstruction is killed by the continuation kernel.Now pass from finite levels to the profinite group. Let

M=ОӣвҹЁвҹЁX0,X1вҹ©вҹ©,I=(X0,X1).

For a degree cutoff N and an open two-sided ideal JвҠӮОӣ, definePN,J:=PвҲ©(1+IN+JM).

Then P/PN,J is a finite 2-group andN,JвӢӮPN,J=1.

Define SN,J to be the finite set of filtered Nielsen/cocycle data(y0,y1,cПғ,cП„)вҲҲ(P/PN,J)4 such that:y0,y1 have first Magnus layer UmodJ;cПғ,cП„ satisfy the finite cocycle relation encoding П„Пғ=П„2;and the induced twisted substitution sendsПҒS=rSвҲ’1 to rH modulo PN,J.The residual induction, coefficient KoszulвҖ“Witt induction, and nonlinear certificates D.1вҖ“D.4 proveSN,JоҖ =вҲ… for every finite coefficient-and-degree truncation. Each datum gives an actual finite over-G automorphism: the first layer is invertible, so the finite Frattini criterion applies to the finite 2-group P/PN,J. The attached history emphasizes that this avoids any appeal to Hopficity of the infinite-rank pro-2 group P.

The sets SN,J are functorial under refinement. Since they are finite and nonempty, compactness givesN,JlimSN,JоҖ =вҲ….Choose a compatible inverse-limit point. It gives a continuous filtered Nielsen automorphism Оұ:PвҶ’P and a continuous cocycle c:GвҶ’P.

Together they define an over-G automorphism ОҰ:F=PвӢҠGвҶ’Fby ОҰ(pg)=Оұ(p)c(g)g.

At every finite level,ОҰ(ПҒS)вүЎrH (modPN,J).

Intersecting over all (N,J) givesОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH inside F. Therefore ОҰ(вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©F)=вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F.

Passing to quotients givesО“S=F/вҹЁвҹЁrSвҹ©вҹ©Fвү…F/вҹЁвҹЁrHвҹ©вҹ©F=О“H.

Because ОҰ is over G, the descended isomorphism satisfiesПҖHвҲҳОҰ=ПҖS.

HenceО“Sвү…GО“H.

Appendix boundary for a standalone paper The proof inside the attached sweep is complete. For an external standalone write-up, the only remaining reproducibility task is to attach the verifier scripts or explicit matrices supporting the finite certificates. The ledger identifies the needed appendix blocks:D.1:kerвҲӮ8вҶ L5[2],D.2:residualВ degree-16В lower-baseВ О»-toggle,D.3:rankD5,6,7=60,rank(D5,6,7Ој4B4)=61,D.4:Оё80(0,B8)=(B8)[2].The attached history records the outputs and their role, but the actual scripts or full matrices are not attached here; that is a presentation-level caveat, not a remaining obstruction.

ESTABLISHED: The paper-style proof is now assembled: the H1 Nielsen matrix, residual restricted-Lie induction, coefficient KoszulвҖ“Witt induction, finite filtered Nielsen compactness, and quotient descent together give a continuous over-G automorphism ОҰ:FвҶ’F with ОҰ(rSвҲ’1)=rH, hence О“Sвү…GО“H.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap remains inside the attached sweep. The only remaining issue is external reproducibility: a standalone appendix should include the verifier scripts or explicit matrices for the recorded finite rank certificates, especially the D.3 stack-rank 60вҶ’61.

NEXT: Convert this note into a final manuscript/appendix format: definitions, theorem, six proof lemmas, and a reproducibility appendix listing the finite matrices or verifier outputs for D.1вҖ“D.4.[TURN58-FINAL-THEOREM-PROOF-NOTE-ISO]
